{{Infobox character
|nom=Eaglet
|apparition=Appears in book 1
|status=Unknown
}}

== Biography ==

The Eaglet is a bird that fell into the pool with other creatures and swam to shore. When the Dodo speaks in elaborate language, the Eaglet objects directly, demanding "Speak English!" and claiming not to understand the Dodo's long words—nor, the Eaglet suggests, does the Dodo himself. This challenge draws suppressed amusement from the assembled birds, indicated by the Eaglet's concealed smile and the tittering of the others.

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Personnages du Tome 1]]
